Package org.areslib.hardware.coprocessors

Class SRSHub

java.lang.Object
com.qualcomm.robotcore.hardware.I2cDeviceSynchDevice<com.qualcomm.robotcore.hardware.I2cDeviceSynchSimple>
org.areslib.hardware.coprocessors.SRSHub
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.qualcomm.robotcore.hardware.HardwareDevice, com.qualcomm.robotcore.hardware.usb.RobotArmingStateNotifier.Callback
@I2cDeviceType @DeviceProperties(xmlTag="SRSHub", name="SRSHub") public class SRSHub extends com.qualcomm.robotcore.hardware.I2cDeviceSynchDevice<com.qualcomm.robotcore.hardware.I2cDeviceSynchSimple>

  • Method Details

    • doInitialize

      protected boolean doInitialize()
      Specified by:
      doInitialize in class com.qualcomm.robotcore.hardware.I2cDeviceSynchDevice<com.qualcomm.robotcore.hardware.I2cDeviceSynchSimple>

    • getManufacturer

      public com.qualcomm.robotcore.hardware.HardwareDevice.Manufacturer getManufacturer()

    • getDeviceName

      public String getDeviceName()

    • init

      public void init(SRSHub.Config config)
      passes the configuration to the SRSHub
      Parameters:
      config - the configuration details that will be passed to the SRSHub

    • update

      public void update()
      bulk-reads data from the SRSHub as specified in the configuration
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the SRSHub has not yet been initialized
      RuntimeException - if the SRSHub is unable to update according to the provided configuration

    • ready

      public boolean ready()
      Returns whether the SRSHub is done initializing.
      Returns:
      whether the SRSHub is done initializing

    • disconnected

      public boolean disconnected()
      Returns whether the most recent update failed.
      Returns:
      whether the most recent update failed

    • readAnalogDigitalDevice

      public double readAnalogDigitalDevice(int pin)
      gets the current value of the AnalogDigitalDevice at the specified pin
      Parameters:
      pin - the pin being read, from 1 to 12
      Returns:
      the current value read from the AnalogDigitalDevice; from 0 to 1 for analog devices and 0 or 1 for digital devices
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the pin is not between 1 and 12, inclusive
      IllegalStateException - if the SRSHub has not yet been initialized
      IllegalStateException - if the pin was not configured

    • readEncoder

      public SRSHub.PosVel readEncoder(int port)
      gets the current position and velocity of the encoder at the specified port
      Parameters:
      port - the port being read, from 1 to 6
      Returns:
      the current position and velocity of the encoder; for quadrature encoders this is in ticks/ticks per second; for PWM encoders this is in pulse width (microseconds/microseconds per second)
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the port is not between 1 and 6, inclusive
      IllegalStateException - if the SRSHub has not yet been initialized
      IllegalStateException - if the port was not configured

    • getI2CDevice

      public <T extends SRSHub.I2CDevice> T getI2CDevice(int bus, Class<T> deviceClass)
      gets the current value(s) read from the specified I2C device at the specified bus
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of the I2CDevice
      Parameters:
      bus - the bus from which the device is being read, from 1 to 3
      deviceClass - the type of device being read
      Returns:
      a wrapper for the current value(s) returned by the I2C device
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the bus is not between 1 and 3, inclusive
      IllegalStateException - if the SRSHub has not yet been initialized
      IllegalStateException - if the device was not configured on the bus

    • runCommand

      public void runCommand(SRSHub.Command command)
      runs a command on an I2C device
      Parameters:
      command - the command to run
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the SRSHub has not yet been initialized
